verse.name: v1
verse.lines: At Your feet I bow, There is none like You. All that I have found, All I want is You: All the wonders You do, All that You are; What can I bring to you? I offer my heart!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Wonderful, magnificent God, I'm humbled by the life You gave. Beautiful Redeemer You are Worthy of my highest praise.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Wonderful, You are wonderful! Wonderful, You are wonderful! Wonderful, You are wonderful! Wonderful, magnificent God!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: What can we give to You, Oh God, For everything You have given to us? What can we give to You, Oh God, For everything You have given to us? (repeat)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We offer our lives to You, Oh God, For everything You have given to us. We offer our lives to You, Oh God, For everything You have given to us. (repeat)
